category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Helm as a Kubernetes package manager.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official helm.sh site; source_facts.name gives helm.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage identifies helm.sh as the official site; https://helm.sh/docs/ is the dedicated official documentation path.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/helm/helm, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says Kubernetes package manager; source_facts.executables lists the helm CLI.
